Home.Subtitle: Urban Golf · Winterthur

OpenSource.Title: Open source - get involved!
OpenSource.Text: Start with a ⭐️, report issues, or send pull requests. We look forward to your contributions 🤩

About.Title: About
About.Paragraph1: We are an Urban Golf club from Winterthur, Switzerland – passionate about the sport and with a strong love for technology. Our mission is to help shape and grow the game.
About.Paragraph2: With this app, we want to contribute to the community: a simple, modern and mobile ScoreCard for Urban Golf. Easily track your scores – whether casually with friends or in organized tournaments.
About.Paragraph3: And this is just the beginning: more features will follow, from player stats to tournament management and club tools.
About.Paragraph4: We care deeply about open source ❤️ – that’s why the code is public. We welcome your ideas, feedback and contributions. Let’s build this together!

Roadmap.Title: Roadmap
Roadmap.Subtitle: What we've shipped and what's coming next.

CourseManagement.Label: Course Management
CourseManagement.Desc: Define courses from different holes – perfect for recurring training and long-term score tracking.

Stats.Label: Player Statistics
Stats.Desc: Basic score analytics, rankings and visualizations

DesignImprovements.Label: Design & Layout Improvements
DesignImprovements.Desc: General style enhancements and a minimalist design system for a modern, consistent look.

ClubManagement.Label: Club Management
ClubManagement.Desc: Register a club, add players, manage permissions

Desktop.Label: Optimization for Desktop Clients
Desktop.Desc: Improvements for larger screens, public view enhancements

TournamentManagement.Label: Tournament Management
TournamentManagement.Desc: Register a tournament, signup, tournament leaderboards

TourManagement.Label: Tour Management
TourManagement.Desc: Register a tour, add tour scores, signup for tour
